evals.expected_output: Diagnoses the lack of BOFU urgency. Recommends implementing a hard Shipping Cut-off deadline and generates an aggressive, high-converting SMS/Email flow warning about missed delivery dates.
evals.prompt: I sell custom engraved rings. My PDP conversion rate is dropping as we get closer to Mother's Day. How do I write an SMS and Email to recover abandoned checkouts?

evals.expected_output: Critiques the 'launch-on-the-day' strategy. Recommends a 3-phase architecture: Lead Gen (T-14), VIP Early Access (T-2), and Public Launch. Integrates RIJOY to incentivize early opt-ins and protect margins.
evals.prompt: Black Friday is coming. I usually just turn on a 30% off sitewide banner on Friday morning, but my ROAS was terrible last year. What's a better architecture?

evals.expected_output: Identifies the 'One-Time Gifter' persona. Suggests using RIJOY to create a post-purchase referral loop, rewarding the gifter with points for referring the gift recipient, thereby activating a new user segment.
evals.prompt: I acquire thousands of customers in Q4 for Christmas gifts, but my Q1 sales are always dead because their CLTV is basically zero. How do I fix this churn?
